mapper.select: SELECT id, username, email, password_hash, status, created_at, updated_at FROM auth_user WHERE email = #{email} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, username, email, password_hash, status, created_at, updated_at FROM auth_user WHERE username = #{username} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, username, email, password_hash, status, created_at, updated_at FROM auth_user WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, username, email, password_hash, status, created_at, updated_at FROM auth_user WHERE email = #{account} OR username = #{account} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO auth_user (username, email, password_hash, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{username}, #{email}, #{passwordHash}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
